content: shadcn/ui charts are built on Recharts and ship as copy-paste components (53+ chart types: area, bar, line, pie, donut, radar, funnel, heatmap, timeline). Theme-aware, fully typed, React 19 + Next.js 15/16 compatible. Install recharts + shadcn chart components via npx shadcn@latest add chart. DataTable + Chart + Card components are the standard admin metrics pattern. No separate Tremor needed — shadcn charts cover the same ground with better project consistency.
